description: CompositionBlue V-neck top made of 100% polyester, has cap sleeves, a tieable bow at the neck, a concealed zipper below the left arm and an elasticated hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top from arrow is a tried-and-true favourite with an angular silhouette that flatters your curves. Pair it with form-fitting denims and kitten heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
